title: Gin Is Torn Between Krieg and Sanji
description: On pages 18–18, the fight against Krieg reaches a moral breaking point as Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy clash over debt, survival, and strength.
scene: Krieg’s weapons and cruelty force everyone at the Baratie to reveal what they truly value: victory, loyalty, survival, or protecting someone else’s dream.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: to put an end to our saviors with my own two hands.

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: H-He just shattered the shield of that guy who said he could even withstand a cannonball!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So he's not just some minor underling...

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: things worked out pretty well, didn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your strategy was to destroy this ship!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: My pirate fleet's battle commander gin...?

summary: This part pushes the Baratie battle toward its climax by contrasting Krieg’s ruthless power with Luffy and Sanji’s stubborn ideals.
